params.name: Riemann Hypothesis
params.description:
On Mar 4, 1859 AD, Riemann presented the Riemann hypothesis to the Academy of Sciences of Berlin.
The Riemann hypothesis, which consists of three statements, is a well-known unsolved problem proposed by mathematician Riemann. According to Riemann, it would be simple to prove the first statement, but it took other mathematicians 46 years to do so. And the remaining statements are still waiting for answers. It wasn't until the mathematician Siegel discovered a new formula in Riemann's manuscrip …
